title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.835 - Copies of law furnished other states
text:
630.835.  Copies of law furnished other states. — Duly authorized copies of sections 630.810 to 630.835 shall, upon its approval, be transmitted by the secretary of state to the governor of each state, the Attorney General and the Secretary of State of the United States, and the Council of State Governments.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
